title: leucanthemum macrotum
intro: Leucanthemum macrotum, also known as the large white daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Compositae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Leucanthemum macrotum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
